name: dhee-render-server
description: A GENERIC headless-Chromium HTML->video appliance. POST self-contained HTML (assets inlined as data: URIs) implementing the seekable-animation protocol (window.seek(t) + window.__dur); it steps the clock frame-by-frame, screenshots, ffmpegs, and returns the mp4. Knows NOTHING about any DSL, app, or filesystem layout — deploy on a many-core/GPU box and never redeploy when the client's DSL changes.
